subject: Re: David Grosof: Next steps on genetics and biology of beauty
body:
i want to know what others are doing in the area

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> 
> Would you like me to create an overview of different
> avenues of
> research on the genetics of beauty (in the form
> perhaps of a couple
> of annotated diagrams)?
>   Do you want me to drill down on a more specific
> set of questions? Which?
>   Do you want me to read the literature on my own
> and then send you
> my personal "research highlights report"?
> 
> Regards,
> David
>
